payload.body: Confirmed real by code-reading (walk_for_fns recursed into every Group including macro_rules bodies) and by cold-cache repro: trust-std lib.rs fired R0042 'call to new (arity 1)' on Duration::new/Mutex::new because newtype!'s template fn new(value) registered as a callee. Fixed in trust-lower walk_for_fns with is_macro_rules_body skip + regression test.
